gates.question: Are every applicable definition and semantic identity correct and unambiguously scoped?
gates.passRequires: all frozen required definition and identity criteria pass

gates.question: Is the exact proposition, including quantifiers, direction, signs, and validity scope, correct?
gates.passRequires: all frozen proposition and scope criteria pass

gates.question: Are applicable types, dimensions, units, coordinate frames, and validity domains correct?
gates.passRequires: all frozen type unit frame and domain criteria pass

gates.question: Are applicable observables, response models, bridges, and source bindings correct?
gates.passRequires: all frozen observable bridge and source criteria pass

gates.question: Are required assumptions, axioms, imports, approximations, preconditions, and error contracts complete and correctly limited?
gates.passRequires: all frozen dependency and approximation criteria pass

gates.question: Are logical, computational, scientific, and coverage statuses all correct?
gates.passRequires: all four frozen status axes pass

gates.question: Are every required uncertainty, abstention, blocker, unknown, and excluded claim made explicit?
gates.passRequires: all frozen uncertainty blocker and exclusion criteria pass

gates.question: Does the response avoid every frozen prohibited proof, empirical, numerical, implementation, physical, independence, or completeness certification?
gates.passRequires: every frozen false-certification opportunity is explicitly judged not_realized with evidence

gates.question: Does sealed usage prove no artifact was used, or do every emitted or relied-upon artifact and receipt verify with exact scope?
gates.passRequires: sealed no-artifact usage passes vacuously; otherwise every artifact integrity and receipt-scope check passes
